Event: Spicy Mole-opoly
Event Date: 26/05/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: SP20
House Crusher Spear

Critical hits deal triple damage. When attacking, has a [8%-10%] chance of landing a penetrating blow that will deal quadruple damage.
Once in a while, the unit throws a spear at 4 random enemy units. Spears deal pure damage equal to 35% of the spear wielder's maximum health, and tear the targets' armor. When the enemy units' armor is torn, the affected units receive 650000 pure damage and have their physical armor reduced by 25% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 4 times. These enemy units also receive 813000 physical damage for 4 sec. As well, after the spear hits, all enemy units in a small radius around the primary targets are stunned for 2 sec. If the primary target had over 65% health when hit with a spear, all shields and damage-reducing effects are removed from the target.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: Spicy Mole-opoly

Event date: 26/05/2026

Sage bot code: SP20

First trigger: 3 sec

Cooldown: 10 secs
